Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}The shells on the floor are only blanks. There's no gunpowder in them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}S-So, what do you think of my room? Are you surprised?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}To be honest... I was hesitant to invite you here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I don't have any welcoming decorations to make this feel like a home...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}It's hard to believe I ever thought this room was normal...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}But, that's exactly why I wanted to show it to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}As you can see from the decor, I'm a machine...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I'll never be the same as humans like Yukari-san or Mitsuru-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}There's something only I can say, because I am unable to die.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}No matter how or when your life comes to an end...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}At that moment, I will be by your side.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}You will... always remain in my heart.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: *Unused message labels. [n]{f 1 5 0}*If this appears, it is a bug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}That's one of my parts that had to be replaced after I collapsed at the Moonlight Bridge.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I asked Mitsuru-san to have it sent here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I'm not afraid, and I won't give up... I'll get back up, no matter how many times it takes...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I'll fight by your side and protect you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}This is the proof of my resolve... And I want you to have it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}If living is about spending time with people you've forged relationships with...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Then, I want to be closer to you than anyone else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}My connection to you is my reason for living.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}What's most important to me is to be by your side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis has a genuine smile upon her face.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel a strong bond with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Aeon Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Metatron{f 0 1 27}, the attendant to the infinite![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}I, um... actually have one more favor to ask...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}At the base of my neck, behind the knot of my ribbon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}That's where my most important component is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}The artificial psyche that makes me who I am...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}My emotional engine... The "Papillon Heart."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}It's extremely delicate, and I'm not allowed to expose it outside of the laboratory's clean room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}If you make direct contact with it, your genetic information will most likely be burnt into it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}I want to leave irrefutable proof on my body of our connection...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Not just as a simple memory, but as something permanent... Something that can never be erased.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis is gazing at me intently...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Since you'll be coming into direct contact with my heart, um...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}I apologize in advance if I say something odd, or make unusual noises...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}For safety, I'll be shutting off the motor functions to my arms and legs.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent a long time with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}
